title: dioscorea japonica var. kelungensis
intro: Dioscorea japonica var. kelungensis is a lesser-known variety of the Dioscorea japonica plant, commonly referred to as a type of yam or mountain yam. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea japonica var. kelungensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the body's natural response to injury and illness. Dioscorea japonica var. kelungensis is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
